name: GitHub Organization Security
description: Security checks for GitHub organization and repository settings.

rules.description: Two-factor authentication is required for all org members
rules.answer_template: Two-factor authentication is required for all organization members. This is enforced at the organization level.
rules.exception_template: Two-factor authentication is not required at the organization level. Compensating control: [describe]. Remediation planned for [date].

rules.description: Default repository permission for org members is read (not write/admin)
rules.answer_template: Default repository permission for organization members is set to read-only, enforcing least privilege.
rules.exception_template: Default repository permission is set to [value] instead of read. Remediation: [describe permission reduction plan]. Target: [date].

rules.description: Branch protection is enabled on the default branch
rules.answer_template: Branch protection is enabled on the default branch, preventing direct pushes and enforcing review requirements.
rules.exception_template: Branch protection is not enabled on the default branch. Remediation: [describe]. Target: [date].

rules.description: Pull request reviews are required before merging
rules.answer_template: Pull request reviews are required before merging to the default branch.
rules.exception_template: Pull request reviews are not required. Compensating control: [describe]. Target: [date].

rules.description: Status checks are required before merging
rules.answer_template: Status checks (CI/CD) are required to pass before merging to the default branch.
rules.exception_template: Status checks are not required before merge. Compensating control: [describe]. Target: [date].

rules.description: Branch protection rules are enforced for admins too
rules.answer_template: Branch protection rules are enforced for administrators, preventing bypass of review and status check requirements.
rules.exception_template: Admin enforcement is not enabled. Administrators can bypass branch protection. Remediation: [describe]. Target: [date].

rules.description: Branches are automatically deleted after merge
rules.answer_template: Branches are automatically deleted after merge, reducing stale branch accumulation.
rules.exception_template: Automatic branch deletion is not enabled. Compensating control: [describe cleanup process]. Target: [date].

rules.answer_template: GitHub secret scanning is enabled, detecting committed secrets and credentials in the repository.
rules.exception_template: Secret scanning is not enabled. Compensating control: [describe alternative secret detection]. Target: [date].

rules.description: Secret scanning push protection is enabled
rules.answer_template: Secret scanning push protection is enabled, blocking pushes that contain detected secrets.
rules.exception_template: Push protection is not enabled. Secrets can be pushed to the repository. Remediation: [describe]. Target: [date].

rules.answer_template: Dependabot security alerts are enabled, providing automated vulnerability notifications for dependencies.
rules.exception_template: Dependabot alerts are not enabled. Compensating control: [describe vulnerability management process]. Target: [date].
